summary.finance: Kospi expected to extend gains; focus shifts to Q1 earnings and WGBI inclusion benefits.
summary.art: BAMA 2026 continues at BEXCO; ongoing exhibitions at SeMA.

market_highlights: Kospi tracking upbeat global sentiment; analysts favor split-buying of domestic leaders.
Positive outlook driven by easing Iran tensions and anticipation of strong Q1 earnings.
WGBI inclusion expected to attract sustained foreign capital.
art_highlights: BAMA 2026 continues through April 5 at BEXCO.
Seo-Seoul Museum of Art 'SeMA Performance' remains open to public.
